utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So , you stole my joke , and you stole my money .

emotion_cause.span: 1_you stole my joke , and you stole my money .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , I was going to stick it in the ATM , but now I think I will show the sexy teller that I am a published writer .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , she is going to know that you stole the joke .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , what are you going to do , follow me down there ?

utterances.text: Well , I am not going to go now anyway .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ah , Gunther , I can not pay for this right now because I am not working , so I have had to cut down on some luxuries like uh , payin for stuff .

utterances.text: Well , if you want , you can work here .

utterances.text: Ya see , it is just , see I was a regular on a soap opera you know ?

utterances.text: And to go from that to this , I just ... Plus , I would have to wait on all my friends .
